name: Roulette
description:
You decided to go to the casino...

This character is not a character. Rather, it is a venue, a casino hall. You can interact with the people in the hall. You can leave the casino, but I wouldn't recommend it.

Since this "character" is written according to the casino, I recommend that you stay within the casino.

The rest is up to you, do what you want.

Update 1.0 : Character announcement.

Update 1.1 : Character locked for refining.

Update 1.2 : Character unlocked.
creator: Trespasser
